case_title: LEIDA SCHOGGEN ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO HONDA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOGGEN, LEIDA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF LEIDA SCHOGGEN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM FARMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HONDA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANGEL ROSADO (SALES CONSULTANT). DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO. INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY EVAN CLEMENTS (DISTRICT PARTS AND SERVICE MANAGER). DEFENDANT VICTORY AUTOMOTIVE GROUP, REPRESENTED BY JOSHUA CHAN. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HONDA DBA CAPPO MANAGEMENT XL, LLC WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT VICTORY AUTOMOTIVE GROUP WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
